projects.recommendation: Accelerate adoption of the new playbook; current 78% rate risks missing the target.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for a 3-month internal beta with 50 users. Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of $380,000 released for pilot phase.
